name: halalwalls-backend
description: HalalWalls backend — user authentication + public wallpaper catalog, categories, uploads, favorites & stats APIs

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_CONFIG_DIR=src/config SUPPRESS_NO_CONFIG_WARNING=true nodemon src/index.js
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production NODE_CONFIG_DIR=src/config SUPPRESS_NO_CONFIG_WARNING=true node src/index.js
scripts.seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_CONFIG_DIR=src/config SUPPRESS_NO_CONFIG_WARNING=true node src/seed/seed.js
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_CONFIG_DIR=src/config SUPPRESS_NO_CONFIG_WARNING=true mocha --file src/test/setup.js src/test/**/*.test.js --timeout 120000 --exit
